summaryProfile.longBusinessSummary: The fund manager employs an indexing investment approach designed to track the target index, a broadly diversified index made up of the value stocks of large U.S. companies, as determined by the index provider. Under normal circumstances, it invests at least 80% of its net assets, plus the amount of any borrowings for investment purposes, in the stocks that make up the target index.

price.longName: Vanguard Value Index Fund ETF Shares
